reasoning: Score improved from 6.9 to 183.1 with the same skeleton, showing the skeleton CAN work. However, the transition_smoothness component uses undirected squared change which rewards ANY change - this is harmful. The ground_contact weight of 2.0 in late stage is too aggressive. The action_cost coefficient (-0.01) is negligible. I will: (1) replace undirected transition_smoothness with a directional version that penalizes deviation from stability; (2) reduce late-stage ground_contact weight; (3) increase action_cost coefficient; (4) add a survival bonus to encourage longer episodes. The skeleton has potential (achieved 183.1) so I'll MIX rather than rebuild.
